summary: Iteration 28: Organ 2 (Canonical Formatters) & Organ 3 (Change Request Frontend) - All features verified. Backend: 13/15 tests passed (2 auth tests failed due to rate limiting, not functionality). Frontend: All UI flows verified via Playwright.

success_rate.backend: 87% (13/15 tests passed - 2 auth tests failed due to rate limiting)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Organ 2 and Organ 3 corrective work complete. All canonical formatters (formatDocContext, formatClientContext, formatClientContextCompact, formatContextSubtitle) are properly imported and used across all specified files. ChangeRequestPanel renders on both quote and invoice detail pages. Buyer ChangeRequestThread shows full message history with both buyer and agent messages.

details.formatDocContext: Used in AgentQuotes, AgentInvoices, AgentDashboard, ClientPreview - displays document_number · client_name · project_name · unit_reference
details.formatClientContext: Used in AgentDecisions for recipient picker - displays name — project_name — unit_reference
details.formatClientContextCompact: Used in DocumentForm client selector - displays name (project_name / unit_reference)
details.formatContextSubtitle: Used in AgentQuoteUpload and AgentVault client picker - displays project_name / unit_reference

zero_inline_patterns.details: grep confirmed zero .filter(Boolean).join patterns outside lib/utils.js

zero_na_placeholders.details: Only one 'Unknown' fallback in AgentVault.js line 327 for edge case when client not found

details.quote_detail: ChangeRequestPanel renders at line 369-373 with Reply/Resolve buttons visible
details.invoice_detail: ChangeRequestPanel renders at line 432-436 identically to quote detail

organ_3_buyer_thread.details: ChangeRequestThread in BuyerTimeline shows full thread with buyer message ('Can you include the backsplash in this price?') and agent response ('Yes, I can include the backsplash for an additional CHF 200. Updated total: CHF 4700.')

dashboard_change_requests.details: Dashboard shows 2 Change Requests with doc type badge and links to correct detail pages

notification_badges.details: Buyer portal shows notification badge (7) and '2 actions needed' badge
